one_time_description: TLE Canada Land Claim Settlement received $17,265,768 with corresponding payments of $22,416,166 distributed to members
economic_notes: Mining agreements with Pan American Silver Corp., Newmont Goldcorp, Elcora Resources, IAM Gold and others. First Nation holds equity investments in multiple junior mining/exploration companies. Casino Rama fund through Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership. Resource Revenue Sharing Agreement with province generating $2.59M.
notes: Fiscal year 2021, not 2024. Province is Ontario (ON). Large TLE Canada Land Claim Settlement of $17.27M received and $22.42M distributed to members in same year causing net shortfall. Band support expenses of $23.7M dominated by member distributions related to TLE. Three consolidated subsidiaries: Flying Post Holdings Inc., Flying Post Development General Partner Inc., Flying Post Development Limited Partnership. Restricted assets include Casino Rama funds ($2.86M) and Resource Revenue Sharing funds ($2.42M). Promissory note of $346,020 fully repaid during year. No schedule of remuneration provided. Net financial assets positive at $20.8M. Cash at year end $14.7M plus $5.3M restricted.
